why: Build completion was not auto-synced to queue-state.json. After a plan was archived, dispatches that triggered it remained in queue_state: auto_executed indefinitely. The hook closes this gap deterministically.

intended_outcome.statement: After lp-do-build archives any plan, dispatches linked to that plan by processed_by.fact_find_slug are automatically written to queue_state: completed with completed_by populated. The operation is idempotent and does not touch already-completed dispatches.
